step_by_step_thinking: The retrieved documents do not mention or reference any information about CRISPR/Cas12a technology, its use in detecting EGFR mutations in circulating DNA, or molecular diagnostics involving liquid biopsy methods. The only references pertain to EGFR inhibitors such as canertinib dihydrochloride and margetuximab, which are therapeutic agents targeting EGFR pathways rather than tools for mutation detection. There is no scientific basis presented linking CRISPR/Cas12a to EGFR mutation detection from circulating tumor DNA in the given data set.
raw_response:
The retrieved documents do not mention or reference any information about CRISPR/Cas12a technology, its use in detecting EGFR mutations in circulating DNA, or molecular diagnostics involving liquid biopsy methods. The only references pertain to EGFR inhibitors such as canertinib dihydrochloride and margetuximab, which are therapeutic agents targeting EGFR pathways rather than tools for mutation detection. There is no scientific basis presented linking CRISPR/Cas12a to EGFR mutation detection from circulating tumor DNA in the given data set.
